lyrics.text: I'm learning to fly, learning to fly
But I ain't got wings, learning to fly
Is the hardest thing, learning to fly
So I've started out, ooh ooh
For God knows where, ooh ooh
I guess I'll know, ooh ooh
When I get there, ooh ooh
But what goes up, learning to fly
I'm learning to fly, learning to fly
I'm learning to fly, learning to fly
But what goes up, I'm learning to fly
I'm learning to fly, learning to fly
I'm learning to fly, learning to fly
